mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attach (name, host_name, size, mimetype, host_path, target, target_id) VALUES (#{name}, #{hostName}, #{size}, #{mimetype}, #{hostPath}, #{target}, #{targetId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM attach WHERE target = #{target} AND target_id = #{targetId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, host_name, size, mimetype, host_path, target, target_id, created_at FROM attach WHERE target IN ('post_draft', 'post_cover_draft') AND created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL 1 DAY
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM attach WHERE target IN ('post_draft', 'post_cover_draft') AND created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL 1 DAY
